description_long: This industrial grinder features a robust metal frame with a large, circular grinding wheel mounted vertically at one end and a set of rollers and a control box at the other. The machine is supported by a sturdy, tubular metal stand with cross-bracing for stability. The control panel is equipped with several buttons and indicator lights, suggesting automated or semi-automated operation. A prominent spool or reel is mounted above the rollers, likely for feeding material into the grinding mechanism. The machine is powered by an electric motor, visible at the rear, and a power cord extends from the control box. The surfaces are primarily metallic, with some painted green and gray panels, and the overall construction is heavy-duty, suitable for workshop or industrial use.
description: A heavy-duty industrial grinder with a large vertical grinding wheel, control panel, and metal frame, designed for workshop or factory environments. It features a prominent spool, rollers, and an electric motor for automated operation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel, rollers, and the spool above the grinding area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large circular grinding wheel and the electric motor at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rollers, spool, and the back of the control box.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the grinding wheel and the side of the control box.
attribute_handle_design: No traditional hand-held handles are visible; operation appears to be via control panel buttons and possibly levers. The design is focused on stationary, automated use rather than manual handling.
